sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.description: Updates an existing warranty claim with the agent decision, recommendation, and state. This is a supervised action that requires user approval before execution.
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.inputs: [{"name":"number","value":"","description":"Claim number in WC-format to identify the record","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"agent_decision","value":"","description":"Agent decision: approve, deny, or escalate","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"agent_recommendation","value":"","description":"Full reasoning for the decision","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"kb_article_cited","value":"","description":"KB article title cited in the decision","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"state","value":"","description":"New state (3=Resolved, 4=Closed, -5=Pending)","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"crudInputs","value":{"operation":"update","table":{"value":"x_snc_medwc_auto_0_warranty_claim","displayValue":"x_snc_medwc_auto_0_warranty_claim"},"query":"number={{number}}","fieldValues":[{"field":{"id":"agent_decision","sublabel":"agent_decision","excludedOperators":[],"label":"agent_decision","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"agent_decision"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{agent_decision}}"}},{"field":{"id":"agent_recommendation","sublabel":"agent_recommendation","excludedOperators":[],"label":"agent_recommendation","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"agent_recommendation"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{agent_recommendation}}"}},{"field":{"id":"kb_article_cited","sublabel":"kb_article_cited","excludedOperators":[],"label":"kb_article_cited","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"kb_article_cited"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{kb_article_cited}}"}},{"field":{"id":"state","sublabel":"state","excludedOperators":[],"label":"state","type":"choice","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"state"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{state}}"}}],"returnFields":[{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"sys_id","label":"sys_id","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"sys_id","sublabel":"sys_id"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"number","label":"number","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"number","sublabel":"number"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"state","label":"state","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"state","sublabel":"state"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"agent_decision","label":"agent_decision","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"agent_decision","sublabel":"agent_decision"}],"limit":"1"},"description":"Update operation configuration","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null}]
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.name: Update Warranty Claim
